title: IESP-667 I fell in love with my sister Lesbian lifted Maika Hiizumi - Kanna Misaki
description: Maika and Kanna have become new families due to their parents' remarriage. They were close to each other, and they were able to talk about anything, and they knew that Maika was a lesbian. I don't think about Maika secretly. At that time, Maika breaks up with her boyfriend. Maika left herself to herself, even though she was gentle and gentle.
